programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 179
programme.desc: Grey Hair Coverage in just 5 washes!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 282
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 251
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 314
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 318
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 281
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 305
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 241
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body's immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism.

programme.title: We Are Big Eaters - All Over Taiwan S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hosted by Chung Hsin-yu, "We Are Big Eaters" bring viewers to popular street food stalls and eateries to recommend good food to the viewers and simultaneously competing for the "Big Eaters" novelty.

programme.title: Homeless in Singapore - EP 1
programme.desc: It's often assumed the homeless must have done something wrong in their lives to fall into such a state. Follow the lives of three homeless individuals to understand the real reasons for homelessness.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 53
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De and Bi An failed to time travel back to their respective era due to the torn passbook. Long Geng witnessed the bizzare sight of "Bi An" disappearing into the passbook and appearing again from it.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 31
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Taizhu receives a mysterious note which reveals that Xiangjun has a son, and the writer is the child's mother. Xiangjun assumes it is merely a prank by a stalker, unaware that it is actually the work of his former stylist, Li Qiangwei.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 32
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Sulin musters up her courage and confesses her feelings to Maoyong. Faced with her affection, Maoyong frankly admits that he already has a daughter and ultimately turns her down.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S10 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 16
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. Nadia deliberately sent Dafri to study in Turkey to keep him away from her daughter. In addition, Dafri’s father asked him to marry Syifa, a woman he had just met for the first time. At that time, Syifa’s wedding fell through because her fiancé, Ilham, suddenly disappeared. After marrying Dafri, Syifa moved with her hu

programme.title: LENGAH DIKIT LANGSUNG CHECK OUT CINTAMU
programme.desc: Gita (Ina Marika) is abruptly dumped by her boyfriend the moment he inherits a massive fortune from his late father overseas. Heartbroken and bitter, Gita tries to crash his upcoming wedding. Following the disaster, she crosses paths with Andre (Kevin Hillers), a flashy, eccentric rock musician who playfully teases her about her failed romance. Traumatized by the betrayal, Gita vows to shield her heart, repeatedly rejecting every man who tries to get close to her.

Their problems multiply when their daughter, Zahra, is diagnosed with a serious illness. The doctor recommends that Zahra undergo treatment in Jakarta. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Si Manis Jembatan Perasaan Aku dan Kamu
programme.desc: In need of money, Syafira (Rachquel Nesia) takes a unique job in Yogyakarta as a 'Kuntilanak' cosplayer to scare young couples at the beach. During her shift, she accidentally crashes into a visitor named El (Fendy Chow). El is terrified when Syafira’s wig ends up on his head, and even more shocked when she deadpans that it’s 'ghost hair

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 189
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple living happily and simply in Magelang. They have a daughter, Zahra. Fathir works as a small-scale contractor. Meanwhile, Sukma is simply a homemaker. One day, Fathir lands a major project. Unfortunately, the project runs into trouble. Their problems multiply when their daughter, Zahra, is diagnosed with a serious illness. The doctor recommends that Zahra undergo treatment in Jakarta. Fathir, Sukma, Zahra, and Ira—Sukma’s adoptive mother—moved to Jakarta. W

programme.title: VILLA CURUG PENGANTIN
programme.desc: Romi was staying at a villa with his friend, and it turned out that Yuli, Romi’s girlfriend, was there too.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 17
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. Nadia deliberately sent Dafri to study in Turkey to keep him away from her daughter. In addition, Dafri’s father asked him to marry Syifa, a woman he had just met for the first time. At that time, Syifa’s wedding fell through because her fiancé, Ilham, suddenly disappeared. After marrying Dafri, Syifa moved with her hu

programme.title: MANIS MANIS BAU AMIS TAPI SUKA
programme.desc: Celine (Hana Saraswati) faces a family curse if she refuses to take over her grandmother's fish restaurant. Despite her severe fish phobia, she flees and nearly crashes into Dion (Marcel Chandrawinata), who is carrying a block of fish. The next day, Celine wakes up reeking of raw fish, causing everyone around her to stay far away.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 23

programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 9
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 6
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Mael Totey
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda naif berusaha bersungguh-sungguh mempelajari bahasa Inggeris agar dapat menawan hati gadis idamannya namun sebaliknya dia jatuh cinta dengan gurunya.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 6

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 14
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 9
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 10
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 1
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 3
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 9
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 10
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: baikpunya - EP 6
programme.desc: Program ini akan membawa anda dalam perjalanan untuk mengetahui tempat-tempat tersembunyi dan tempat-tempat popular di Malaysia yang disyorkan oleh penduduk tempatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Suhana, Nadia, dan Fika baru saja diceraikan Jay. Harta mereka telah berpindah milik kepada Jay setelah Jay berjaya pedayakan mereka tandatangani surat yang mereka tidak tahu pun isi kandungannya.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 8
programme.desc: Mawar mula patah hati apabila dia merasakan yang Mikail mungkin tidak ada perasaan istimewa terhadapnya. Semenjak kehadiran Mikail, Afia mula bersikap dingin terhadap Dr Iskandar.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 3
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 10
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 13
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 28
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 16
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Cinta Kura-Kura
programme.desc: Tentang Nani bersama kura-kura peliharaannya, Nico yang mempunyai kelebihan luar biasa iaitu boleh bercakap dengan manusia.

programme.title: Fantasy Escape - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merealisasikan impian peminat bertuah untuk melakukan aktiviti yang mereka gemari bersama selebriti pilihan mereka yang turut berkongsi pengalaman dan memberi motivasi.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 2
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Mr London Ms Langkawi - EP 12
programme.desc: Aidid yang di besarkan di luar negara bertemu sepupunya Nana, yang berjiwa besar cintakan tanah air. Walaupun mereka sering berselisih pendapat namun akhirnya disatukan atas kehendak keluarga.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 2
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 14
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 8
programme.desc: Mawar mula patah hati apabila dia merasakan yang Mikail mungkin tidak ada perasaan istimewa terhadapnya. Semenjak kehadiran Mikail, Afia mula bersikap dingin terhadap Dr Iskandar.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 7
programme.desc: Jit memberitahu Ameera tentang sesuatu kesilapan dari masa silamnya. Ben dan Mindy pula menunjukkan sebuah video yang melibatkan Datin Saloma melakukan sesuatu yang mencurigakan.

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 8
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Kehidupan Jay dan empat orang isterinya nampak bahagia namun hakikatnya isteri – isterinya saling membenci. Konflik terjadi apabila isteri ke-4 dibunuh. Siapakah pembunuhnya?

programme.title: Teroka Lokal - EP 11

programme.title: Pung Pang Rizalman - EP 8
programme.desc: Program masakan bersama Dato' Rizalman Ibrahim yang turut menampilkan selebriti-selebriti terkemuka di Malaysia.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 15
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 9

programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

programme.title: Middle Class Love
programme.desc: A young college boy is frustrated being in middle-class family setup and finds love the ideal way to get out of it. Release Year: 2022 Director: Ratnaa Sinha

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards- Hall of Fame, Best Special Effects-Redchillies.VFX . Awards of the International Indian Film Academy- Best Action, Best Special Effects,

programme.title: Khushi
programme.desc: Khushi and Karan share a love hate relationship. Whilst setting their friends up in a relationship, they themselves end up connecting romantically. Release Year: 2003 Director: S. J. Surya

programme.title: Mujhe Kucch Kehna Hai
programme.desc: An accident brings Karan and Pooja close to each other. When Karan finally decides to propose to her, he realises that destiny has other plans for them. Release Year: 2001 Director: Satish Kaushik Awards: Zee Cine Awards: Best Debut Male: TuSShar Kapoor.

programme.title: Don Aur Doctor
programme.desc: An honest doctor, Das, befriends Deva, a feared gangster. But when duty clashes with loyalty, their strong friendship faces a heartbreaking test.

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: The commando, Karanveer Singh Dogra, is approached to chase and catch an Indian criminal gang, who pose a threat to India itself. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Datt

programme.title: Kalyug
programme.desc: A newly married couple is caught on camera during their honeymoon. When the wife commits suicide after the video is released on internet, the husband sets out to seek revenge. programme.desc: Vijay Akshay Kumar and Pooja Madhuri Dixit are deeply in love, but a tragic accident leads Pooja to believe Vijay is dead. She marries her friend Amar Saif Ali Khan, only to have Vijay return, leading to a complex love triangle. Release Year: 1965 Director: Ramanand Sagar

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: Colour Photo
programme.desc: Jayakrishna and Deepthi are engineering students whose backgrounds differ greatly from each other. However, circumstances bring them together and make them fall in love.

programme.title: Pratikar
programme.desc: Krishna embarks on a quest to avenge the tragic death of his foster sister. However, things take an unexpected turn when his foster brother begins to pursue him for taking the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Metro In Dino
programme.desc: The bittersweet stories of four urban-dwelling couples intertwine as they navigate the complexities and joys of relationships in modern-day India.

programme.title: Kuch Naa Kaho
programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.title: Shakti
programme.desc: Ashwini, an honest policeman, refuses to trade a captured gangster for his son Vijay's release after a ruthless gangster kidnaps him. Vijay grows up resenting his father and turns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Lagaan
programme.desc: During the British Raj, a farmer named Bhuvan accepts the challenge of Captain Andrew Russell to beat his team in a game of cricket and enable his village to not pay taxes for the next three years.

programme.title: It's My Life
programme.desc: Abhishek is a young man from a wealthy family whose life has always been controlled by his overbearing father. However, he soon decides to stand up to him after falling in love with a woman.

programme.title: Mubarakan
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers turn to their eccentric uncle for help to make sure that they each marry the woman they love.

programme.title: Chhorii 2
programme.desc: When a supernatural cult abducts her seven-year-old daughter, Sakshi must rescue her, while fighting the deep-rooted societal injustices that continue to haunt her and the young woman around her

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: In a country where the government has imposed a national curfew, single mother Susan notices changes in her daughter's behavior.She seeks virtual help from a pastor, who proposes conducting an online.

programme.title: Sirf Ek Bandaa Kaafi Hai
programme.desc: A common man with honesty and integrity can take on the system when he has truth on his side.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other.

programme.desc: The grandchildren of two sworn enemies want to put the bitterness between the families behind them, but will the bloodthirsty traditions compel them to do otherwise?

programme.title: Koi Jaane Na
programme.desc: A heartbroken writer struggling with writer's block goes to a hill station where he finds love again but uncovers a copycat serial killer who has mysteriously come alive.

programme.desc: A woman rejects her arranged marriage, sparking a chaotic chase as she tries to escape the wedding, while the groom and his family try to catch her.

programme.desc: A basketball coach serves community service by training Neurodivergent adults after a DUI. His outlook changes as he learns from his players.

programme.title: On Acheve Bien Les Chevaux
programme.desc: Bruno Bouche, Clement Hervieu-Leger and Daniel San Pedro take on Horace McCoy's noir novel about dance marathons in the United States in 1929, where participants were prepared to dance to death. 32 dancers, 9 actors and 4 musicians in a visceral, out-of-this-world dance-theatre experience.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 6
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs - EP 4
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set off in search of the ships torpedoed by the Germans just off the Newfoundland coast during the Second World War.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde - EP 1
programme.desc: Felix trained as a lawyer before leaving the fast-moving life of Montreal behind him to answer the call of the wild and become a hunter-gatherer in Chibougamau forest. With no running water, he learnt to live in almost total self-sufficiency while respecting nature. A remote life which suits him perfectly.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles - EP 7
programme.desc: Michael Ottenwaelter became passionate about black gold, the name given to earthworm castings because they transform organic matter into fertile humus. When he meets Agnes and Sylvain Gerber, farmers who produce ecological and sustainable organic soil thanks to earthworms, his life takes a turn...

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1849
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre - EP 1
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier and Virginie Jacobs show us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 75
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 75
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre - EP 1
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier and Virginie Jacobs show us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles - EP 7
programme.desc: Michael Ottenwaelter became passionate about black gold, the name given to earthworm castings because they transform organic matter into fertile humus. When he meets Agnes and Sylvain Gerber, farmers who produce ecological and sustainable organic soil thanks to earthworms, his life takes a turn...

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 45
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 41
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 42
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 73
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 51
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 51
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 49
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 50
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco - EP 4
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1850
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Les Heros Du Patrimoine - EP 1
programme.desc: Saint-Vaast-la-Hougue, in the Cotentin, where volunteers are working to restore two towers designed by Vauban and built by Napoleon. Between duty of remembrance and historical legacies, Adrien meets Philippe Prost, architect specialising in military heritage, together with Veronique Chabrol, fighting the installation of wind turbines.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Sous Le Tapis
programme.desc: Odile and Jean are getting ready to host their children and grandchildren at their house in the country for Odile's birthday. When Jean suddenly dies of cardiac arrest, Odile panics and hides the body under the bed...

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 1
programme.desc: Remi Dumont, an indigenous boarding school survivor in search of healing and redemption wants to tell his story.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 2
programme.desc: New revelations turn Julianne's life upside down.

programme.title: Ramadam - EP 3
programme.desc: From stage to cinema, classical music, artistic immersion and performances, ''Ramdam'' showcases culture in all its forms and offers an opportunity to meet the artists themselves. Those involved discuss their career, their interpretation of the work, the creative process and share their view of the subjects raised.

programme.title: Angelo Dans La Foret Mysterieuse
programme.desc: Angelo, 10 years old, finds himself alone at a motorway rest area, forgotten by his parents. Without losing heart, he decides to cut through the forest. He then ventures into a mysterious territory populated by strange beings, threatened by an enemy even worse than the ogre of the region...

programme.title: Spoon
programme.desc: To escape everyday life and fulfill your dream, it's quite simple: you need a ladder and a spoon.

programme.title: La Mort Du Petit Cheval
programme.desc: Gaby is thrown out by her mother, without even a pair of shoes, but with her cat. She quickly ends up at her sister's place.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: La Grande Arche
programme.desc: When the austere district of La Defense, a symbol of modernity, becomes the setting for a reflection on architecture, memory, and power.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde - EP 2
programme.desc: Dreaming of an alternative life, Jair, Melanie and their two children first lived in a gypsy caravan and a yurt before moving into their passive solar house. Wishing to contribute to creating a better world, they have transformed this 'Earthship' made of glass and recycled tyres into a family cocoon.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express

programme.title: Movie - Kizhakku Cheemayile
programme.desc: A brother shares a close bond with his sister and is ecstatic to see her get married. However, problems arise when his new brother-in-law disapproves of the sibling relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Sondhakaran
programme.desc: A vengeful criminal frames a policeman for sexual assault. After serving his sentence, he starts working as a watchman and saves residents of a building from a fraudster who runs a chit fund.

programme.title: Movie - Thai Pongal
programme.desc: Janaki loses her husband early in her life and is left with a girl child. Without any support, she experiences tough situations involving lecherous men. She meets Vairam who supports her.

programme.title: Movie - Thathi Thavuthu Manasu
programme.desc: Three village girls who yearn to taste the big city life get to attend a friend's wedding in Chennai. But their joy comes to a halt when their money is stolen, leaving them stranded.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Maha Nadigan
programme.desc: Sathya, a junior artiste, manages to secure a chance to play a hero in a movie. As his fame gradually increases, he is ambitious to become the chief minister of the state.

programme.title: Movie - Thaaikulamae Thaaikulamae
programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Pennin Manathai Thottu
programme.desc: A heart surgeon is loved by everyone in his family. A woman and a kid with a heart problem arrive at his house, but when she learns the identity of the doctor, she refuses to let the child have an operation performed by him.

programme.title: Movie - Majunu
programme.desc: Vasanth, son of an MP, falls in love with Heena, who is believed to be the main suspect behind a bomb attack on his father. Vasanth secretly helps her return to Kolkata and soon follows to meet her.

programme.title: Movie - MaaVeeran
programme.desc: Harsha is falsely implicated for killing Indu's father and she too is kidnapped. But Harsha and Indu share a bond from a previous life, and when he realises this, he sets out to set things straight.

programme.title: Movie - Kannodu Kanpathellam
programme.desc: Sitharam is in love with Kalyani and decides to propose to her. However, when two lovers, Akhila and Akash, play a prank on Sitharam which leads to him losing Kalyani, he takes revenge on them.

programme.title: Movie - Theechatti Govindan
programme.desc: Govindan, a police officer, pursues Uday and Raghu, the sons of a corrupt politician, for raping a nun. When he discovers that the two are involved in a robbery too, he tries to gather evidence.

programme.title: Movie - Thirudi
programme.desc: Aravind, who is training to be a karate champion, falls in love with Thamarai. However, things take a turn when he is forced to leave for Chennai.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Vaitheeswaran
programme.desc: A young boy is killed by an aspiring politician; his upset mother tries to kill herself, but a man tells her that her son will be reborn. She waits for her son in a temple for 30 years; this attracts the curiosity of a doctor who offers to treat her.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie - Oomai Vizhigal
programme.desc: PRK is on a killing spree whereby he randomly kills women and is aided by a local politician and nefarious doctor. A policeman and a committed journalist join hands to nab him.

programme.title: Movie - Ponmanam
programme.desc: An unemployed Anandhan's family has no expectations from him. However, when his parents commit suicide after his sister elopes, he is determined to find her.

programme.title: Movie - Ratchasan
programme.desc: Arun gives up on his dream of becoming a filmmaker and takes up the job of a police officer after his father's death. He then attempts to track down a psycho killer.

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026
programme.desc: The German Open is an annual badminton tournament, held since 1955. Organized by the German Badminton Association, it is a key European stop featuring top international players, held at the Westenergie Sporthalle in Mülheim.

programme.title: ATP Originals Series
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Ostrava Open is a professional tennis tournament for women held in Ostrava, Czech Republic, known for its indoor hard courts. It will be held at the Ostravar Arena and Ridera Sports Complex, featuring 30 singles players.

programme.title: ASO Marathon Programming 2026
programme.desc: The Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris is one of the world's largest and most popular road races, featuring over 50,000 participants from 110 countries. The race course starts on the Champs-Élysées and finishes near Avenue Foch.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Mallorca Championships is an annual professional tennis tournament held at the outdoor grass courts of Mallorca Country Club in Santa Ponsa, Mallorca. As the only grass-court tennis tournament in Southern Europe, the event attracts some of the world's highest-ranking players who are looking to adjust their game from clay to grass.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Mallorca Championships is an annual professional tennis tournament held at the outdoor grass courts of Mallorca Country Club in Santa Ponsa, Mallorca. As the only grass-court tennis tournament in Southern Europe, the event attracts some of the world's highest-ranking players who are looking to adjust their game from clay to grass.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Dubai Duty Free tennis stadium in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 20 JAN
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 22, kicking off with the Manchester derby, we then turn to Chelsea against Brentford, before Monday night's finale as Brighton face Bournemouth.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'elf', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we meet lots of little elves. We see pointy ears and hats and stripy tights. We meet elves who are ice skating, one sitting on a shelf and another who is really cheeky! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Messy can't find his caterpillar friends. The bush where he left them is covered with butterflies. But where did the caterpillars go?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 49
programme.desc: Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room. But when bed time comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Carrot sings about being trendy.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the books in the supermarket to build a huge tower.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Supertato uses his hiccups to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's jam attack.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 79
programme.desc: It's a special day for yellow Laa-­Laa. Big yellow flowers grow in Teletubbyland and a yellow balloon leads Laa-­Laa to Tiddlytubby Umby Pumby.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 13
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'present', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different presents - a wrapped-up present, one with a bow, another for a birthday and a present to make you feel better. There are some for parties, one made by a squirrel and another that is just because! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy monster can't work out why his cart won't move. The wheels just won't go round like normal. Off he goes to OKIDO to find out why.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 50
programme.desc: Mojo's got the perfect top for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex. But could an actual dinosaur still be alive under Jackson's field, or is it a case of mistaken identity?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch supersizes a fierce Komodo dragon, the Go Jetters must find the sizeray to fix the glitch.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 44
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 47
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Australia in search of little red flying foxes. Along the way he meets a frilled lizard.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about different types of art and what inspires it, while preparing their own pieces for Tino the artistic mouse's Woodland Biennale.

programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 11
programme.desc: Angel's life has spiralled as unchecked shopping habits have taken over her finances and her home. With reduced work hours but persistent spending, her home is now dangerously overcrowded.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 12
programme.desc: A burst water pipe above her living room threatens to worsen conditions, with water soaking into piles of clothes and other items, creating a breeding ground for mould.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: From Taiwan to Singapore, addicted gamblers bet on anything and everything, with ruthless bookies using extortion to ensure payment.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Krystal-9 gang in Malaysia would ruthlessly resort to blackmail, extortion, kidnapping and torture against those who can't repay their debts.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 6
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 9
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: The Sorcerer From Hell
programme.desc: With the help of his three wives, an Indonesian witch doctor called Ahmad Suradji admitted to killing 42 women over a period of 11 years.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: After a woman's body is found in a neighbourhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people, but will they be able to convince the men to break their brotherly bond?

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: When police pull over a local man for violating his parole, the case takes a shocking turn when he suddenly confesses to multiple brutal murders.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S3) - EP 5

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 13

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 7

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 8

programme.desc: Husband and wife architects Gaurav and Vish design a multigenerational home for their aging parents and young children, entirely clad in over 9000 terracotta tiles.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: On SA's Limestone Coast, Craig heads to a non-conformist winery, Kristy meets a couple who traded in a life of luxury yachts to hang out with camels and Halina explores a clever approach to tackling plastic waste.

programme.title: Four Corners (2026) - EP 20
programme.desc: As the AFL pushes for growth, we uncover new evidence of brain disease in younger players. Families of players diagnosed with CTE speak about the risks of repeated head trauma. Has the AFL been transparent about the risks?

programme.title: Media Watch (2026) - EP 21
programme.desc: Karl Stefanovic loses his job after embracing a controversial anti-Islam activist. ABC rejects an opinion piece by business woman Sall Grover. CCP propaganda finds its way into regional newspapers, in a branded opinion piece.

programme.title: Compass S40 - EP 15
programme.desc: New media entrepreneur Hannah Ferguson is on the rise but back home in Orange with her mum Philippa, a different Hannah emerges. Despite their political differences, both are dedicated to empowering women in their own ways.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 131
programme.desc: Emma Rebellato and Catherine Murphy bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, plus sport and Lillian Rangiah with your weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 131
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 131
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. Lorna Dunkley brings you the day's top stories and the latest news, with live crosses to reporters and guests, plus sport with Catherine Murphy and weather with Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 131

programme.title: Ben 10 S3 - EP 1

programme.title: Ben 10 S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: China's Plans for an Urban Super City
programme.desc: China’s Greater Bay Area will fuse 11 cities into a megalopolis that includes Hong Kong, which Beijing hopes will become a new Silicon Valley. But the plan is part of a much larger transformation.

programme.title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space
programme.desc: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence has begun to exhibit early signs of agency. Are we on a path to superintelligence? Self destruction? Or is the potential promise and threat of AI being overblown?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow us to talk to them. What can we learn from wildlife, and should we be talking to the animals at all?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging. Who will be first to harness this new technological force, and what will they do with it?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: For some, pain is excruciating and inescapable. But amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, new technologies are being developed to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Protect. How can we be optimistic in 2025? As Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Waste is a significant contributor to global warming, but turning it into a resource can help curb emissions and shrink humanity's environmental footprint.

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Spanish in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 68 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 130
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: EMISSARY - EP 11
programme.desc: Jiang Dawei, an idealistic student turned police officer, goes undercover to infiltrate a drug lord's inner circle. As he gathers evidence, his personality drastically changes, causing rifts with loved ones. He endures isolation and hardship to fulfill his duty.

programme.title: Deadly Sins & What's On Today - EP 3
programme.desc: Exploring the darker side of human nature when desire spirals out of control, this drama revolves around the East New Territories Regional Crime Unit, which investigates a series of bizarre murder cases and uncovers shocking secrets.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2841
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.desc: Wayne Lai and Mak Cheung-ching return in a second journey through the Jianghu world, exploring classic wuxia culture, historic landmarks, local delicacies and regional traditions across China while reliving the spirit of martial arts legends.

programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.
